description: Composition Black t-shirt made of 95% viscose and 5% lycra, has a round neck with a buttoned chest placket, short sleeves with branding printed above the left hem and inner neck, and has a brand badge on the left seam Fitting Regular Wash care only hand wash cold using a mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Turn inside out before washing and drying Do not bleach, wring or tumble dry Flat dry in shade Mild iron/do not iron on print or embroidery Slip into your second skin and live in ease with this black t-shirt from lee. The viscose fabric is sure to flow around your body and keep you fresh, comfortable and free from sweat all day, while the lycra allows you to stretch with ease. Team this T-shirt with shorts, jeans and skirts and enjoy comfort like never before. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height: 5'7" Chest: 33" Waist: 25"
